name: Mary's Check Cashing
description_short: Mary's Check Cashing offers check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers at their Los Angeles location on Venice Boulevard with extended hours.
description_long:
Mary's Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located at 5425 Venice Blvd. in Los Angeles, CA 90019. The business operates under the brand riamoneytransfer.com, suggesting ties to a broader money transfer network. Based on available information, the company provides essential financial services to customers in the Los Angeles area who need quick access to funds from checks and other basic financial transactions.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, along with money orders and wire transfers. These services cater to individuals who may not have bank accounts or who need immediate access to funds without the processing delays typical of traditional banking. The availability of multiple financial transaction options positions them as a one-stop location for basic financial needs beyond just check cashing.

Mary's Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 7:00 PM on Fridays while maintaining standard 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM hours on other weekdays and Saturday. This schedule accommodates working individuals who may have difficulty accessing services during traditional business hours. The phone-accessible customer service line (323) 931-0858 provides direct contact capability for customers with questions.

As a check-cashing service, this company serves an important niche for unbanked and underbanked consumers who rely on alternative financial services. However, customers should be aware that check-cashing services typically charge fees that can be substantial relative to the transaction amount, and these services do not build credit history or offer the protections and benefits of traditional banking relationships.

No credit-building benefits or credit history reporting from transactions

diagnosis: Mary's Check Cashing is best for unbanked or underbanked Los Angeles residents who need immediate cash access from checks and basic financial transactions outside traditional banking hours. The primary caveat is that check-cashing fees will reduce the amount received, and these services do not contribute to building credit or financial history.
